description: Style NoteA practical and stylish solution to managing your monetary essentials, this wallet from fiorelli is the perfect accessory for all your outfits. Handcrafted from premium leather, this piece is specially designed and created with the highest quality standards, ensuring that it will last for several years. Its classic styling and minimalistic detailing offers unbeatable understated style.nbsp; Product DetailsRed wallet with two buttoned tab closure and metal brand badge on the frontThree fold wallet with flap on left foldTwo main compartmentsFive credit card slots with one slip pocket on both the sidesEight credit card slots, a photo id card holder with one slip pocket on the flapOne main zippered compartment with two inner separators at backOne pocket with flap and magnetic button closure attached behind the zippered compartmentGuarantee: 1yrMaterials and CareLeatherWipe with damp cloth to remove dust SizeDimensions: 15 cm x 9 cmWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
